titles.text: グッドボーイ・ギャラクシー

descriptions.text: A vibrant sci-fi platform adventure game for the Game Boy Advance, where you help Maxwell the dog explore unfamiliar worlds, make strange new friends and contend with mysterious forces - by jumping, shooting, slicing, shrinking, warping and drilling.

Maxwell's homeworld is nearing collapse. In a last-ditch effort to find help, he hyperjumps where no dog has gone before. Stranded, he finds himself at the edge of a hostile system - if there's any hope of return and rescue he'll need every friend (and every weapon) he can find. Like all underdogs, the odds are stacked against him, but you can't keep a good dog down.

Help Maxwell explore unfamiliar worlds, make strange new friends and contend with mysterious forces.
platformer game for Game Boy Advance, PC, and Nintendo Switch
videojuego de plataformas para Game Boy Advance, PC y Nintendo Switch
